source: upstream caveman claude-opus-4-8-2026-06-15-online eval (micro-full output arm); conservative carry-over for the flint fable-5 ruleset
note: Mean per-mode OUTPUT-token savings vs a no-compression baseline. Only MEASURED modes are listed. Unmeasured modes are intentionally absent so /flint-stats reports 'no estimate' instead of inventing a number. Recalibrate by running node .claude/flint/commands/flint-bench.js --online --model claude-fable-5 (budget-guarded) and updating the measured means here.
